title: Blissful Diary Muslin Nursing Cover for Breastfeeding, Breathable Breastfeeding Cover up with Arch Neckline for Women, Nursing Apron (Roman Green)
features: Premium Muslin Cotton: The nursing cover is made of muslin cotton, which is soft, lightweight and breathable. It keeps cool and cozy for both mothers and babies, even in hot summer. Plus, the muslin material stays soft even after washing

Privacy Protection for Mom: Our nursing cover up for breastfeeding provides enough privacy for moms while you nurse your babies in public. Free to take with you wherever you go and just breastfeed with confidence

Arch Shape Neckline: The special arch neckline on our breastfeeding cover is designed for air ventilation and make it a window for mums to make eye contact and interact with babies while breastfeeding

Adjustable Neck and Back Straps: The apron-like nursing cover comes with adjustable neck and back straps to help moms keep the cover in place and provide a safe private breastfeeding space while nursing. Makes breastfeeding on the go a breeze
Nice Breastfeeding Essentials: Designed in light and neutral colours, our nursing cover is versatile and chic for mothers in different styles. Since it is great as a gift for moms-to-be and mothers
